defects.defect: No game title banner with ribbon/scroll decoration; reference has a prominent 'Find the Dog' banner with red ribbon at top center
defects.direction: Add a styled title banner with decorative ribbon at the top of the content area

defects.defect: Missing the prominent 'Play Now' button above the bottom navigation dock
defects.direction: Add a primary 'Play Now' action button directly above the bottom navigation bar, matching the reference flow

defects.defect: Dock items (Shop, Play, Settings) are rendered as equal-sized square buttons in a flat row rather than Play being a dominant central element that rises above the dock
defects.direction: Make the central Play button significantly larger and elevated above the dock baseline to match the reference's dominant Play treatment

defects.defect: Title text reads 'SHELL PROOF PHASER' in all-caps spaced font instead of the game's actual title
defects.direction: Use the correct game title typography matching the reference banner style

defects.defect: only one currency shown vs reference's two (coins + magnifier)
defects.direction: secondary currency is optional; no change required

defects.defect: No-ads button (circle with ADS crossed out) present in reference is absent in OURS
defects.direction: Add the no-ads shortcut button to the upper-left area

defects.defect: secondary currency placement differs but is optional per spec
defects.direction: acceptable; could align currency to upper region as reference
defects.region: OURS 1 top-left coin pill vs reference right-side coin

defects.defect: Level path shows only 2 nodes (checkmark and level 2 + lock) versus reference's vertical chain of levels 2–5
defects.direction: Expand the level map to show more level nodes along the vertical path

defects.defect: Currency display is placed in the top-left header instead of the top-right
defects.direction: Move the currency pill to the top-right of the screen to align with standard shell structure

defects.defect: Shop icon is a shopping cart instead of a shopping bag as in the reference
defects.direction: Replace cart icon with a shopping bag icon to match reference

defects.defect: OURS shows a large landscape illustration/preview card that does not exist in the reference
defects.direction: Remove the scenic illustration card or replace with the level-map path structure

defects.defect: secondary currency placement differs but is optional per spec
defects.direction: acceptable; could align currency to upper region as reference
defects.region: OURS 1 top-left coin pill vs reference right-side coin

defects.direction: secondary currency is optional; no change required
